bird.name: 紅隼
bird.summary: 紅隼（學名：Falco tinnunculus）为隼科隼属的鳥類。又名茶隼、紅鷹、黃鷹、紅鷂子。 這種鳥類分佈廣泛，原生範圍遍及歐洲、亞洲和非洲，偶爾也會到達北美洲東海岸。

locations.name: 湿地
locations.summary: 濕地（wetland）是永久或季節性被较浅的水（少于6米的淡水、半咸水或海水）掩蓋的獨特自然环境，是一種許多缺氧過程具有優勢的半水生生態系統，也是陸地生態系統和水域生態系統之間的過渡性地帶。有許多水生植物生長在土壤长期被水体浸泡的特定濕地…

relations.subject: 紅隼
relations.evidence: The common kestrel readily adapts to human settlement, as long as sufficient swathes of vegetation are available, and may even be found in wetlands, moorlands and arid savanna

relations.subject: 紅隼
relations.evidence: It is a diurnal animal of the lowlands and prefers open habitat such as fields, heaths, shrubland and marshland
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: 紅隼
relations.evidence: The common kestrel readily adapts to human settlement, as long as sufficient swathes of vegetation are available, and may even be found in wetlands, moorlands and arid savanna
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 紅隼
relations.evidence: The common kestrel readily adapts to human settlement, as long as sufficient swathes of vegetation are available, and may even be found in wetlands, moorlands and arid savanna
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。
